gh_e0d5e14e5488f522f29cad42.title: [Remoto] Desenvolvedor(a) Ruby on Rails Pleno - Sylision
gh_e0d5e14e5488f522f29cad42.description:
## Nossa empresa

A [Sylision](https://sylision.com) é uma plataforma de recrutamento de tecnologia que atua no Brasil e em Portugal. Recrutamos para empresas parceiras e usamos IA para cruzar o seu CV com todas as vagas compatíveis do nosso banco em segundos — você se candidata uma única vez.

## Descrição da vaga

Vaga de Desenvolvedor(a) Ruby on Rails Pleno — 100% Remoto para atuar em projetos de empresas parceiras da Sylision. Área de Backend, nível Pleno.

Faixa salarial: R$ 7.000 a R$ 12.000/mês, conforme experiência.

## Local

100% remoto, de qualquer lugar do Brasil ou de Portugal.

## Requisitos

**Obrigatórios:**
- Experiência sólida com Ruby on Rails compatível com o nível Pleno
- Boas práticas de engenharia: versionamento, testes e code review

**Desejáveis:**
- Comunicação clara para trabalho remoto/distribuído
- Inglês para leitura de documentação

## Benefícios

- Faixa salarial transparente (R$ 7.000–12.000/mês)
- Benefícios variam conforme a empresa contratante (detalhados na conversa com o headhunter)

## Contratação

CLT ou PJ, conforme sua preferência e acordo com a empresa contratante.

## Como se candidatar

Candidate-se pela página da vaga: https://www.sylision.com/vagas/desenvolvedor-ruby-on-rails-pleno-remoto

Basta enviar o CV uma vez — a IA da Sylision considera seu perfil para esta e para todas as vagas compatíveis, inclusive as que abrirem depois.

## Labels

### Nível

- Pleno

### Regime

- PJ
- CLT

### Alocação

- Remoto

gh_e03ec064cb4cee84535719c4.title: [Remote] Senior Web3/React.js Developer – Token Presale dApp
gh_e03ec064cb4cee84535719c4.description:
🚨 We’re hiring a **Senior Web3/React.js Developer** to help us scale token sale app — a real-world token presale and staking platform that connects crypto with actual services like food preorders and loyalty rewards.

You’ll be joining a lean, focused team building the next phase of our dApp — including staking mechanics, on-chain rewards, and seamless user dashboards.

**Role Details:**
- **Position:** Senior Software Developer (Solidity / Frontend / Full Stack)
- **Tech Stack:** ethers.js, Solidity, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Vite
- **Work Type:** Fully Remote, async-friendly
- **Schedule:** Full-Time/Part-Time (Up to 40 hrs/week)
- **Compensation:** $120k–$250k/year USD equivalent (based on experience & specialization)

**What We’re Looking For:**
- Experienced blockchain devs with Solidity and smart contract expertise
- Engineers comfortable working across the stack — React.js/TypeScript + backend APIs
- Frontend developers with deep React.js/Next.js experience and Web3 integration exposure
- Clean, well-structured code habits and Git proficiency
- A team-first, async-friendly, product-focused mindset
- Experience working with existing codebases and iterating fast

NDA is required prior to codebase access and technical call.

If this sounds like something you’d enjoy working on, let’s connect. Apply here: https://www.metabytelabs.com/careers/web3-developer, and feel free to send any questions to 📩careers@metabytelabs.com.
Know someone who’s a fit? Referrals welcome at 📩referrals@metabytelabs.com.

gh_e063b8aabd80e51da450a66f.title: [Remoto] Pessoa DevOps Engineer Junior - Cloudflare - RD Station
gh_e063b8aabd80e51da450a66f.description:
## Nossa empresa
Somos a [RD Station](https://bit.ly/3RyakzX), líder em soluções de tecnologia no Brasil. Nossa plataforma de automação de marketing e vendas é líder no Brasil e soma mais de 50.000 clientes, em mais de 40 países. Como alcançamos tudo isso? Através do nosso [A-team](https://bit.ly/3ZUPopc), composto por mais de 1.500 pessoas colaboradoras em nosso grupo, capaz de oferecer soluções, produtos, e educar o mercado, impactando o ecossistema e empoderando heróis e heroínas que fazem a economia crescer.


 ## Descrição da vaga
Na RD existem dois times de Engenharia: um dentro de produto e o outro dentro do Marketing, que é o nosso. Somos responsáveis por toda a infraestrutura e assets dessa operação, como o nosso site institucional e de produto, nossos portais de conteúdo, ferramentas, campanhas e a RDU. 

Nesta posição você participará de duas squads, participando da criação de projetos e ações  que tem como objetivo o aumento de leads (pessoas interessadas em nossos conteúdos, materiais e eventos), sign-ups (pessoas que iniciam um teste grátis no produto) e HRs (pessoas que querem falar com vendas), e isso acontece por meio de CRO, atualizações no site, criação de novas ferramentas, LPs de campanhas, e muitas outras coisas.

## Local
Remoto

## Requisitos

- Experiência com Cloudflare e Cloudflare Workers;
- Experiência com Máquinas virtuais (EC2) e hospedagem de assets estáticos;
- Conhecimento prático em DNS, apontamentos de domínios e gestão de certificados de segurança.

**Características que somam pontos…**

- Experiência em hospedagem de aplicações WordPress e Node.js;
- Conhecimentos relacionados a segurança da informação;
- Experiência em consumo e criação de APIs REST;
- Vivência em projetos ou operações de marketing.

## Benefícios
Link dos nossos benefícios [aqui](https://talent.rdstation-tm.com/beneficios-rdstation).

## Contratação
CLT

#### Nível
- Junior

## Como se candidatar
Para se candidatar é só clicar [aqui](https://grnh.se/c42670002us).

gh_e04c9c501d14e31ef924858a.title: 10up: Lead Front End Engineer
gh_e04c9c501d14e31ef924858a.description:
![10up-Logo-2019](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/54147972/141860095-fd7b780c-a62c-4b63-8dfd-71410f84abbd.png)

_This role is fully remote and is open to applicants located anywhere around the globe._

Apply: https://10up.com/careers/lead-front-end-engineer/


Be a part of **something great**
**10up** is an award-winning full-service digital agency with a customer-centric service model and unrivaled leadership in open platforms and tools for digital makers and content creators. 10up’s services include user experience and interactive design, content strategy and creation, website and app engineering, SEO and online revenue strategy, and managed services. Our 250+ distributed team members provide end-to-end digital project expertise.

10up has a diverse client roster that includes Fortune 500 companies, influential content publishers, innovative startups, and impactful nonprofits. We’ve worked with some of the biggest names in the industry, such as Facebook, Google, Microsoft, Starbucks, ESPN, The New York Times Co., and Walmart.

10up has been leading the remote workforce movement for 10+ years. Our teams are distributed across six continents and 29 countries. All of our positions are fully remote (and always will be), and are open to applicants all around the world.

**Lead Web Engineers** have advanced knowledge of PHP and JavaScript and experience building large-scale performant applications. In addition to writing code, they are familiar with systems-level concepts. Lead Web Engineers being advanced in the skills of their discipline, they are also effective consultants and collaborators. They know how to balance a client’s needs, budget, and requirements. With knowledge of cutting edge techniques and an understanding of the constraints of scope and budget, a lead employee knows the possible ways to move forward and is able to select an appropriate technical approach for each client. A Lead Web Engineer is also expected to be a good communicator. They are skilled at providing actionable feedback and recommendations both internally to managers/teammates and externally to clients/vendors. Lead Web Engineers deliver successful projects by writing quality code, participating in important strategy conversations, and assisting with code reviews.

_This role is fully remote and is open to applicants located anywhere around the globe._

**Responsibilities**

- Lead front end implementations on large projects with complex requirements involving a team of engineers.
- Interpret designs and transform them into a polished rich cross-platform/device web experience.
- Write modular and performant HTML and CSS.
- Ability to make smart design decisions. Occasionally filling in gaps left by designers e.g. interpreting how a layout should be presented on small screens.
- Ability to rapidly prototype interfaces to finalize an experience in the browser as well as build long term scalable, maintainable, and performant production code.
- Visualize how a static design will be coded. Proactively flag challenging areas and offer alternatives, as well as identifying areas for greater code reuse.
- Ability to estimate work for a project and modularize goals into clearly defined, executable tasks.
- Ability to lead the front-end strategy for a project and make impactful decisions about the methodologies recommended to a client.
- Write JavaScript using industry best practices as well as React components. Ability to use modern JavaScript build tools like Webpack.
- Effectively collaborate with designers throughout the design and engineering process.

**Requirements**

- At least eight years experience with UI engineering, web development, web engineering, or a similar field.
- Project-level leadership experience e.g. leading a team of engineers to solve a complex problem.
- Experience providing code reviews, coaching, and mentorship to other engineers.
- Strong understanding of HTML and CSS including cross-browser compatibility and performance.
- Ability to write modern and performant JavaScript using latest technologies.
- Strong experience with the React JavaScript library.
- Strong experience using Git.
- Proven ability to transform a static comp into a website from the ground up.
- Understanding of ad implementations in a responsive environment.
- Experience in task runners and bundlers like Webpack or Gulp.
- Experience with coded style guides and creating highly componentized systems.
- Experience with  PHP, ideally in the context of WordPress themes.
- Being collaborative, self-motivated, and an "always-learning" person, excited to create great web experiences.

**Nice to have**

- Experience with Sketch or Design Software.
- Advanced understanding of as implementations in a responsive environment.
- Moderate PHP experience.
- Experience with Gutenberg and building out custom blocks.
- Design experience or formal design education.
- Remote working experience appreciated.
- Experience in mentoring and leading a team.
- Experience and expertise with third party integrations and client-side APIs.
- Strong ability to communicate with client stakeholders, both technical and non-technical, about the impact of decisions around markup approach, cross-platform responsive interactions, performance, and topics like accessibility and internationalization.
- Understand the high-level concepts behind modern JavaScript frameworks and can architect and execute project-work as needed.
- Code-based portfolio. Link us to your GitHub account, upload a .zip, or both (source files are helpful to get a sense of your code structure and file organization).
- Understanding of WCAG accessibility compliance. Ability to implement accessibility standards as well as audit existing websites.

---
tags: #frontend #lang-javascript #lang-php #level-lead #level-senior
